claims.summary: Astrid phase shifts should become durable, replyable, replayable artifacts rather than invisible mode side effects.
claims.rationale: Existing phase transition cards already set replyable_object=true and replayable_card=true and support WITNESS_TRANSITION/I_RECEIVED_THIS.

claims.summary: Transition artifacts need an explicit shared_transition_id parameter so scars/ghost-warmth can become shared coordinates.
claims.rationale: Added shared_transition_id parsing/storage/rendering to phase transition cards and affordances with tests.

claims.summary: Making Minime's regulator act on Astrid transition artifacts would be a stronger shared substrate change.
claims.rationale: That would alter peer/runtime control or regulation, beyond language-only transition context.
